ORDER 1 CASE NO. CGC-03-417577

 
1 Plaintiff Patricia Westerfield’s Motion to File a Third Amended Complaint came on for
2 || hearing before this court on November 12, 2004 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 301, the Honorable
3 || James Warren presiding. |
4 Having reviewed the papers submitted in support of, and in opposition to the Motion to |
5 || File a Third Amended Complaint, the court HEREBY FINDS AS FOLLOWS:
6 Plaintiff's Motion to File a Third Amended Complaint is granted. Defendants have
7 || submitted to the tentative ruling. The tentative ruling is adopted. |
8 IT IS SO ORDERED. |
